steps.name: User login into SCM application
User navigate to Inventory Management
Select the "1BL" on InventoryManagement Screen
User clicks on Item Quantities- under Actions
User enter "R40003" to search for existing availability
User should see deatils of existing stock values
User clicks on Create Miscellaneous Transactions
User should see "Miscellaneous Transactions" dashboard
User clicks on Edit icon
User select Transaction Type as "Account Alias Receipt" and Account Alias as "WUK" and click on Save
User should see option to "Add Item"
User clicks on "Add Item" button
User enter product as "R40003"
User select subinventory as "1BL" and Locator as "M1A01"
User enter quantity as "100"
User select reason code as "B" from Additional Fields
User enter Product Reference as "Product Change code Account Alias Receipt"
User clicks on Done
User should see "Miscellaneous Transactions" dashboard with line details
User clicks on submit
User should see pop up as "Item received"
User login into SCM application
User navigate to Inventory Management
Select the "1BL" on InventoryManagement Screen
User clicks on Item Quantities- under Actions
User enter "R40003" to search for existing availability
User should see deatils of existing stock values
User clicks on Create Miscellaneous Transactions
User should see "Miscellaneous Transactions" dashboard
User clicks on Edit icon
User select Transaction Type as "Account Alias Receipt" and Account Alias as "WUK" and click on Save
User should see option to "Add Item"
User clicks on "Add Item" button
User enter product as "R40003"
User select subinventory as "1BL" and Locator as "M1A01"
User enter quantity as "5"
User select reason code as "B" from Additional Fields
User enter Product Reference as "Product Change code Account Alias Receipt"
User clicks on Done
User should see "Miscellaneous Transactions" dashboard with line details
User clicks on submit
User should see pop up as "items issued"
